title: MasterClass FBA_KCMCHB18 27 cm Fluted Ring Cake Tin with PFOA Non Stick Coating, Robust 1 mm Thick Carbon Steel, 10.5 Inch Savarin Mould, Grey
features: EXCEPTIONAL NON STICK: with 2 layers of Quantum II non stick, this fluted round cake tin releases food easily and cleans in seconds
SUPREME PERFORMANCE: 1 mm thick carbon steel ensures smooth heat transfer, while its sandblasted surface improves non stick adhesion
RING SHAPED: the distinctive shape makes it ideal for traditional gugelhupf cakes, syrupy savarins, and countless more classic recipes
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: From the manufacturer MasterClass Non-Stick Fluted Ring Cake Tin A kitchen staple, built to Master Class's exacting quality standards. MasterClass’s Non-Stick Fluted Ring Cake Tin is manufactured from commercial-grade carbon steel finished with a double non-stick coating. It’s designed to provide superior results for decades. With its beautiful fluted pattern, your ring cakes will look as good as they taste. The pan is fridge and freezer safe, so it’s ideal for dishes that need to set. Product Details Quantum II coating is 100 per cent PTFE, PFOA and BPA-free With an easy-clean dishwasher-safe finish Oven safe to 220 degrees Celsius / 428 degrees Fahrenheit Fluted design for a professional-looking finish MasterClass Quality This pan is made from 1 mm commercial grade carbon steel. This heavyweight material is designed to resist warping, and to provide that beautifully-defined ring shape for years to come. Quantum II Non-Stick Coating Presentation is everything with any ring-shaped dish. This pan is finished with a double layer of non-stick Quantum II coating so it releases food quickly and easily, preserving its delicate fluted look. Its surface has been sandblasted to allow this ceramic-reinforced coating to adhere its surface more effectively. Professional Performance Bakeware Achieve the perfect bake with the acclaimed Master Class Bakeware collection - whether you're baking a ring cake or loaf of banana bread with one of our non-stick loaf tins. At MasterClass, we love food. Our award-winning bakeware collection is packed with premium features for exceptional performance. Established in 1850, MasterClass combines outstanding design with a passion for food that elevates the culinary experience and allows total confidence when cooking. Every product is designed with one simple goal in mind: to make great food accessible to anyone who cooks or wants to cook. With over 600 products that offer outstanding performance every time, MasterClass allows you to accomplish what you want with flair, no matter your reason for cooking. Love food and cook with confidence, cook with MasterClass. Feeding your passion to cook since 1850.
